'''Zam Ghanol''' was a wiry, old [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] with gray hair.

==Biography==
She was one of the pirates who followed [[Erli Prann]] in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] aboard a [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun|Golan II]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. When caught between the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']] and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], Ghanol demanded that Prann turn the ship over to the Alliance. Prann initially refused, though after his crew mutinied and subdued him, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] was permitted to take the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
